hero.label: Engineering design — road infrastructure
hero.title: We build infrastructure that connects people
hero.sub: Comprehensive engineering design of roads, bridges and accompanying infrastructure.

about_short.text: Road infrastructure engineering with emphasis on technical consistency and construction realities. We support investments at every stage.

competences.title: Four pillars of our design work.
competences.item1_text: Roads, intersections, driveways, pavements and cycle paths.
competences.item3_text: Stormwater drainage, ditches, outlets and retention.
competences.item4_text: Permanent and temporary traffic organisation and signage.

process.title: A clear process from analysis to construction support.
process.step1_text: We identify the investment scope, site conditions, and formal and technical requirements.
process.step2_text: We develop solutions consistent with investor requirements and construction realities.
process.step3_text: We coordinate documentation with disciplines, network operators and road administrators.
process.step4_text: We assist with approvals, changes and the construction phase.

team.title: Design engineers and specialists responsible for documentation quality.

contact.title: We will prepare a scope of support tailored to your investment.
contact.name: Full name
contact.message_placeholder: Briefly describe your project or enquiry…
contact.success_sub: We will get back to you shortly.

project_page.contact_text: Get in touch — we'll prepare solutions tailored to your needs.

o_nas_page.hero_title: An engineering office focused on practical solutions and multi-discipline coordination
o_nas_page.hero_sub: We prepare technically consistent documentation adapted to construction realities.
o_nas_page.cta_sub: We will prepare a support scope tailored to the investment, documentation stage and technical requirements.
